description: Providers with paid-per-claim z-score > 3.0 for T1019
sql_template:
WITH code_stats AS (
                    SELECT AVG(paid_per_claim) AS mean_ppc, STDDEV(paid_per_claim) AS std_ppc,
                           PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY paid_per_claim) AS median_ppc,
                           COUNT(*) AS num_peers
                    FROM provider_hcpcs WHERE hcpcs_code = 'T1019' AND claims >= 10
                )
                SELECT ph.billing_npi, ph.paid_per_claim, ph.claims, ph.paid,
                       (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.mean_ppc) / NULLIF(cs.std_ppc, 0) AS z_score,
                       (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.median_ppc) * ph.claims AS excess_amount,
                       cs.median_ppc, cs.num_peers
                FROM provider_hcpcs ph CROSS JOIN code_stats cs
                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = 'T1019' AND ph.claims >= 10
                  AND cs.num_peers >= 20 AND cs.std_ppc > 0
                  AND (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.mean_ppc) / cs.std_ppc > 3.0
                  AND (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.median_ppc) * ph.claims > 10000
                ORDER BY z_score DESC LIMIT 50

WITH code_stats AS (
                    SELECT AVG(paid_per_claim) AS mean_ppc, STDDEV(paid_per_claim) AS std_ppc,
                           PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY paid_per_claim) AS median_ppc,
                           COUNT(*) AS num_peers
                    FROM provider_hcpcs WHERE hcpcs_code = '97116' AND claims >= 10
                )
                SELECT ph.billing_npi, ph.paid_per_claim, ph.claims, ph.paid,
                       (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.mean_ppc) / NULLIF(cs.std_ppc, 0) AS z_score,
                       (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.median_ppc) * ph.claims AS excess_amount,
                       cs.median_ppc, cs.num_peers
                FROM provider_hcpcs ph CROSS JOIN code_stats cs
                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = '97116' AND ph.claims >= 10
                  AND cs.num_peers >= 20 AND cs.std_ppc > 0
                  AND (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.mean_ppc) / cs.std_ppc > 3.0
                  AND (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.median_ppc) * ph.claims > 10000
                ORDER BY z_score DESC LIMIT 50

WITH code_stats AS (
                    SELECT AVG(paid_per_claim) AS mean_ppc, STDDEV(paid_per_claim) AS std_ppc,
                           PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY paid_per_claim) AS median_ppc,
                           COUNT(*) AS num_peers
                    FROM provider_hcpcs WHERE hcpcs_code = '90834' AND claims >= 10
                )
                SELECT ph.billing_npi, ph.paid_per_claim, ph.claims, ph.paid,
                       (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.mean_ppc) / NULLIF(cs.std_ppc, 0) AS z_score,
                       (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.median_ppc) * ph.claims AS excess_amount,
                       cs.median_ppc, cs.num_peers
                FROM provider_hcpcs ph CROSS JOIN code_stats cs
                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = '90834' AND ph.claims >= 10
                  AND cs.num_peers >= 20 AND cs.std_ppc > 0
                  AND (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.mean_ppc) / cs.std_ppc > 3.0
                  AND (ph.paid_per_claim - cs.median_ppc) * ph.claims > 10000
                ORDER BY z_score DESC LIMIT 50

description: Providers with claims-per-bene z-score > 3.0 for T1019
sql_template:
WITH code_stats AS (
                    SELECT AVG(claims_per_bene) AS mean_cpb, STDDEV(claims_per_bene) AS std_cpb,
                           PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY claims_per_bene) AS median_cpb
                    FROM provider_hcpcs WHERE hcpcs_code = 'T1019' AND beneficiaries >= 12
                )
                SELECT ph.billing_npi, ph.claims_per_bene, ph.beneficiaries, ph.paid,
                       (ph.claims_per_bene - cs.mean_cpb) / NULLIF(cs.std_cpb, 0) AS z_score,
                       cs.median_cpb
                FROM provider_hcpcs ph CROSS JOIN code_stats cs
                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = 'T1019' AND ph.beneficiaries >= 12 AND cs.std_cpb > 0
                  AND (ph.claims_per_bene - cs.mean_cpb) / cs.std_cpb > 3.0
                  AND ph.claims_per_bene > 2 * cs.median_cpb
                ORDER BY z_score DESC LIMIT 50

                       (ph.claims_per_bene - cs.mean_cpb) / NULLIF(cs.std_cpb, 0) AS z_score,
                       cs.median_cpb
                FROM provider_hcpcs ph CROSS JOIN code_stats cs
                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = '99211' AND ph.beneficiaries >= 12 AND cs.std_cpb > 0
                  AND (ph.claims_per_bene - cs.mean_cpb) / cs.std_cpb > 3.0
                  AND ph.claims_per_bene > 2 * cs.median_cpb
                ORDER BY z_score DESC LIMIT 50

description: Providers with claims-per-bene z-score > 3.0 for T2024
sql_template:
WITH code_stats AS (
                    SELECT AVG(claims_per_bene) AS mean_cpb, STDDEV(claims_per_bene) AS std_cpb,
                           PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY claims_per_bene) AS median_cpb
                    FROM provider_hcpcs WHERE hcpcs_code = 'T2024' AND beneficiaries >= 12
                )
                SELECT ph.billing_npi, ph.claims_per_bene, ph.beneficiaries, ph.paid,
                       (ph.claims_per_bene - cs.mean_cpb) / NULLIF(cs.std_cpb, 0) AS z_score,
                       cs.median_cpb
                FROM provider_hcpcs ph CROSS JOIN code_stats cs
                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = 'T2024' AND ph.beneficiaries >= 12 AND cs.std_cpb > 0
                  AND (ph.claims_per_bene - cs.mean_cpb) / cs.std_cpb > 3.0
                  AND ph.claims_per_bene > 2 * cs.median_cpb
                ORDER BY z_score DESC LIMIT 50
